name: Milestone Pharmaceuticals Inc.
summary: PARTI Company Overview We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of innovative cardiovascular medicines. Our approved product CARDAMYST TM (etripamil) nasal spray is available in the United States and is the first and only FDA approved self-administered treatment for use by patients anywhere, anytime an attack of PSVT occurs.
